# @architecture/orchestrator

Runs architecture tooling in governed dependency order and emits self-evidence.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @architecture/orchestrator
Version: 0.1.0
Component: orchestrator
Type: tool
System: architecture-governance
Domain: architecture
Bounded context: architecture-governance
Owner: architecture
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: tooling
Class: active.tooling
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: architecture
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Coordinate architecture tooling commands
- Preserve dependency ordering
- Stop on failed required dependencies
- Emit orchestrator self-evidence

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not replace individual tool validation rules
- Does not write package metadata
- Does not generate governance evidence by default
